headline: EQR's Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Coastal Demand Strength
summary: EQR beats Q1 normalized FFO estimates as demand strengthens, occupancy stays at 96.5%, and returns rise via buybacks and a dividend hike.

raw.headline: EQR's Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Coastal Demand Strength
raw.summary: EQR beats Q1 normalized FFO estimates as demand strengthens, occupancy stays at 96.5%, and returns rise via buybacks and a dividend hike.

headline: ESS Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Same-Property NOI
summary: ESS tops Q1 core FFO estimates on 4.1% same-property NOI growth. Revenues rise to $484.8M, with guidance reaffirmed after NOI-driven upside.

raw.headline: ESS Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Same-Property NOI
raw.summary: ESS tops Q1 core FFO estimates on 4.1% same-property NOI growth. Revenues rise to $484.8M, with guidance reaffirmed after NOI-driven upside.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on AvalonBay Communities, Raises Price Target to $188
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Brad Heffern   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $180 to $188.

raw.headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on AvalonBay Communities, Raises Price Target to $188

headline: AvalonBay Communities Inc (AVB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Start with Revenue ...
summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc (AVB) surpasses expectations with increased occupancy, strategic share repurchases, and promising development plans for 2026.

headline: AvalonBay (AVB) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Benjamin Schall: Thank you, Matt, and good afternoon, everyone.  Among our peer set, we were the only one to raise equity capital in size in 2024, having raised almost $900 million of equity on a forward basis at an implied initial cost of 5%.

raw.headline: AvalonBay (AVB) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
raw.summary: Benjamin Schall: Thank you, Matt, and good afternoon, everyone.  Among our peer set, we were the only one to raise equity capital in size in 2024, having raised almost $900 million of equity on a forward basis at an implied initial cost of 5%.
